H6200.strongs_def: an Aroerite or inhabitant of Aroer

H6202.derivation: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of sloping); properly, to bend downward; but used only as a denominative from H6203 (עֹרֶף),
H6202.strongs_def: to break the neck; hence (figuratively) to destroy
H6202.kjv_def: that is beheaded, break down, break (cut off, strike off) neck.

H6203.strongs_def: the nape or back of the neck (as declining); hence, the back generally (whether literal or figurative)

H6206.strongs_def: to awe or (intransitive) to dread; hence, to harass
H6206.kjv_def: be affrighted (afraid, dread, feared, terrified), break, dread, fear, oppress, prevail, shake terribly.
H6206.usage: afraid(3x), fear(3x), dread(2x), terribly(2x), break(1x), affrighted(1x), oppress(1x), prevail(1x), terrified(1x)

H6207.strongs_def: to gnaw, i.e. (figuratively) eat (by hyberbole); also (participle) a pain

H6208.derivation: patrial from an unused name meaning a tush;
H6208.strongs_def: an Arkite or inhabitant of Erek

H6209.kjv_def: make bare, break, raise up (perhaps by clerical error for raze), [idiom] utterly.

H6210.derivation: from an unused root meaning perhaps to arch;

H6212.derivation: from an unused root meaning to glisten (or be green);

H6213.strongs_def: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
H6213.kjv_def: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease, do, (ready) dress(-ed), (put in) execute(-ion), exercise, fashion, [phrase] feast, (fight-) ing man, [phrase] finish, fit, fly, follow, fulfill, furnish, gather, get, go about, govern, grant, great, [phrase] hinder, hold (a feast), [idiom] indeed, [phrase] be industrious, [phrase] journey, keep, labour, maintain, make, be meet, observe, be occupied, offer, [phrase] officer, pare, bring (come) to pass, perform, pracise, prepare, procure, provide, put, requite, [idiom] sacrifice, serve, set, shew, [idiom] sin, spend, [idiom] surely, take, [idiom] thoroughly, trim, [idiom] very, [phrase] vex, be (warr-) ior, work(-man), yield, use.
H6213.usage: make(653x), wrought(52x), deal(52x), commit(49x), offer(49x), execute(48x), keep(48x), shew(43x), prepare(37x), work(29x), perform(18x), get(14x), dress(13x), maker(13x), maintain(7x)

H6214.derivation: from H6213 (עָשָׂה) and H410 (אֵל); God has made;
H6214.strongs_def: Asahel, the name of four Israelites

H6215.derivation: apparently a form of the passive participle of H6213 (עָשָׂה) in the original sense of handling; rough (i.e. sensibly felt);
H6215.strongs_def: Esav, a son of Isaac, including his posterity

H6217.derivation: or עָשֻׁק; passive participle of H6231 (עָשַׁק);
H6217.strongs_def: used in plural masculine as abstractly, tyranny

H6218.strongs_def: ten; by abbreviated form ten strings, and so a decachord

H6221.derivation: from H6213 (עָשָׂה) and H410 (אֵל); made of God;

H6222.derivation: from H6213 (עָשָׂה) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has made;
H6222.strongs_def: Asajah, the name of three or four Israelites

H6224.strongs_def: tenth; by abbreviation, tenth month or (feminine) part

H6225.strongs_def: to smoke, whether literal or figurative

H6227.strongs_def: smoke, literally or figuratively (vapor, dust, anger)

H6231.strongs_def: to press upon, i.e. oppress, defraud, violate, overflow
H6231.kjv_def: get deceitfully, deceive, defraud, drink up, (use) oppress(-ion), -or), do violence (wrong).
H6231.usage: oppress(23x), oppressor(4x), defraud(3x), wrong(2x), deceived(1x), oppression(1x), violence(1x)

H6235.derivation: masculine of term עֲשָׂרָה; from H6237 (עָשַׂר);
H6235.strongs_def: ten (as an accumulation to the extent of the digits)

H6237.derivation: a primitive root (identical with H6238 (עָשַׁר)); to accumulate; but used only as denominative from H6235 (עֶשֶׂר);
H6237.strongs_def: to tithe, i.e. to take or give atenth
H6237.kjv_def: [idiom] surely, give (take) the tenth, (have, take) tithe(-ing, -s), [idiom] truly.

H6238.strongs_def: properly, to accumulate; chiefly (specifically) to grow (causatively, make) rich
H6238.kjv_def: be(-come, en-, make, make self, wax) rich, make (1 Kings 22:48 marg). See H6240 (עָשָׂר).

H6240.kjv_def: (eigh-, fif-, four-, nine-, seven-, six-, thir-) teen(-th), [phrase] eleven(-th), [phrase] sixscore thousand, [phrase] twelve(-th).

H6245.strongs_def: probably to be sleek, i.e. glossy; hence (through the idea of polishing) to excogitate (as if forming in the mind)

H6249.derivation: apparently masculine plural construction of H6247 (עֶשֶׁת) in the sense of an afterthought (used only in connection with H6240 (עָשָׂר) in lieu of H259 (אֶחָד))

H6252.strongs_def: Ashtaroth, the name of a Sidonian deity, and of a place East of the Jordan
H6252.kjv_def: Asharoth, Astaroth. See also H1045 (בֵּית עַשְׁתָּרוֹת), H6253 (עַשְׁתֹּרֶת), H6255 (עַשְׁתְּרֹת קַרְנַיִם).
H6252.pos: proper feminine noun with reference to deity, proper locative noun

H6253.strongs_def: Ashtoreth, the Phoenician goddess of love (and increase)

H6254.strongs_def: an Ashterathite or inhabitant of Ashtaroth

H6255.derivation: from H6252 (עַשְׁתָּרוֹת) and the dual of H7161 (קֶרֶן); Ashtaroth of (the) double horns (a symbol of the deity);
H6255.strongs_def: Ashteroth-Karnaim, a place East of the Jordan

H6256.strongs_def: time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc.
H6256.kjv_def: [phrase] after, (al-) ways, [idiom] certain, [phrase] continually, [phrase] evening, long, (due) season, so (long) as, (even-, evening-, noon-) tide, (meal-), what) time, when.

H6257.kjv_def: make fit, be ready to become.

H6258.strongs_def: at this time, whether adverb, conjunction or expletive
H6258.kjv_def: henceforth, now, straightway, this time, whereas.

H6260.strongs_def: prepared, i.e. full grown; spoken only (in plural) of he-goats, or (figuratively) leaders of the people

H6262.strongs_def: Attai, the name of three Israelites

H6264.strongs_def: prepared; by implication, skilful; feminine plural the future; also treasure
H6264.kjv_def: things that shall come, ready, treasures.

H6265.derivation: from H5790 (עוּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has helped;

H6266.strongs_def: properly, antique, i.e. venerable or splendid

H6269.derivation: from an unused root meaning to sojourn; lodging;

H6270.derivation: from an unused root meaning to compress; constringent;

H6271.derivation: or עֲתַלְיָהוּ; from the same as H6270 (עַתְלַי) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has constrained;
H6271.strongs_def: Athaljah, the name of an Israelitess and two Israelites
H6271.pos: proper feminine noun, proper masculine noun

H6272.strongs_def: probably to glow, i.e. (figuratively) be desolated

H6273.derivation: from an unused root meaning to force; forcible;

H6274.derivation: from the same as H6273 (עׇתְנִי) and H410 (אֵל); force of God;

H6275.strongs_def: to remove (intransitive or transitive) figuratively, to grow old; specifically, to transcribe
H6275.kjv_def: copy out, leave off, become (wax) old, remove.

H6277.derivation: from H6275 (עָתַק) in the sense of license;

H6278.derivation: from H6256 (עֵת) and H7011 (קַיָּם); time of a judge;

H6279.derivation: a primitive root (rather denominative from H6281 (עֶתֶר));
H6279.strongs_def: to burn incense in worship, i.e. intercede (reciprocally, listen to prayer)

H6282.strongs_def: incense (as increasing to a volume of smoke); hence  a worshipper

H6285.strongs_def: properly, mouth in a figurative sense, i.e. direction, region, extremity

H6286.derivation: a primitive root; also denominative from H6288 (פְּאֹרָה),
H6286.strongs_def: to gleam, i.e. (causatively) embellish; figuratively, to boast; also to explain (i.e. make clear) oneself; to shake a tree
H6286.kjv_def: beautify, boast self, go over the boughs, glorify (self), glory, vaunt self.

H6288.derivation: or פֹּרָאה; or פֻּארָה; from H6286 (פָּאַר);
H6288.strongs_def: properly, ornamentation, i.e. (plural) foliage (including the limbs) as bright green

H6289.strongs_def: properly, illuminated, i.e. a glow; as noun, a flush (of anxiety)

H6291.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be torpid, i.e.

H6292.derivation: or פִּגֻּל; from an unused root meaning to stink;

H6293.strongs_def: to impinge, by accident or violence, or (figuratively) by importunity
H6293.kjv_def: come (betwixt), cause to entreat, fall (upon), make intercession, intercessor, intreat, lay, light (upon), meet (together), pray, reach, run.
H6293.usage: fall(12x), meet(11x), reach(7x), intercession(4x), intreat(2x), entreat(1x)

H6295.derivation: from H6294 (פֶּגַע) and H410 (אֵל); accident of God;

H6297.strongs_def: a carcase (as limp), whether of man or beast; figuratively, an idolatrous image

H6298.strongs_def: to come in contact with, whether by accident or violence; figuratively, to concur

H6299.strongs_def: to sever, i.e. ransom; gener. to release, preserve
H6299.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, deliver, [idiom] by any means, ransom, (that are to be, let be) redeem(-ed), rescue, [idiom] surely.
